summary: Cybersecurity student with hands-on experience building AI-powered security tools, including an intrusion detection system and a network risk scanner. Skilled in Python, Flask, machine learning model deployment, and SIEM tools such as Wazuh.

experience.title: Cybersecurity Intern
bullets: Deployed Wazuh SIEM with Kali Linux as manager and Windows machine as monitored endpoint
Resolved infrastructure issues including VMware USB controller configuration and version-specific install paths
Completed structured lab tasks covering log monitoring, alert configuration, and endpoint security

projects.name: CyberSentinel (Final Year Project)
bullets: Built live packet capture and analysis system using Flask and Scapy
Trained Random Forest (99.92%), DNN (99.51%), and SVM (96.09%) models on NSL-KDD dataset
Implemented OWASP-compliant authentication with OTP password reset and GeoIP tracking
Developed 4-tier threat classification system with automated blocking and email alerts

projects.name: NetSentinel AI
projects.description: AI-powered port scanner and network risk assessment tool
bullets: Designed Flask backend with bcrypt authentication and SQLite database
Built asynchronous TCP scanner with banner grabbing capability
Integrated CVE correlation via NVD API and AI-driven threat analysis using Groq API
Trained ensemble ML models on NSL-KDD achieving up to 99.58% accuracy
Built interactive dashboard with PDF report generation

projects.name: PhishGuard AI
bullets: Built phishing URL classifier achieving ~97% accuracy on UCI dataset
Implemented deep scan feature using BeautifulSoup for content analysis

education.institution: Sir Syed CASE Institute of Technology
